sentence: I am in pain, please help me.
I am having pain in my leg, could someone please check on me.
My arm is hurting, I need some help please.
My back is in pain, could you help me adjust my position.
I am having chest pain, please come quickly.
I have a headache, could I please have some medication.
My stomach is hurting, I need assistance please.
My shoulder is hurting quite a lot, could you please take a look.
I am having pain in my hip, could you help me reposition please.
My knee is hurting, could someone please check on me.
I have pain in my neck, could you help adjust my pillow please.
My foot is hurting, could you please take a look at it.
My hand is in pain, I need some help please.
My pain is getting worse, I really need some help right away.
I have a burning sensation, could someone please come check on me.
I am having sharp pains, please could someone come quickly.
I have a dull aching pain that is not going away, I need assistance.
I am hurting badly, I need pain medication please.
I think I need my pain medication, could you bring it please.
I need my medication now please, it is urgent.
My muscles are very sore, could you help me with a gentle stretch please.
My wound is causing me a lot of pain, could someone please look at it.
I think I may be developing a pressure sore, could you check my skin please.
I am feeling too hot, could you help me cool down.
I am feeling cold, could I please have a blanket.
I am feeling too hot in bed, could you adjust my blanket or the room temperature.
I am cold in bed, could I please have an extra blanket.
Could I please have a blanket, I am feeling cold.
Could you remove the blanket please, I am too warm.
Could you open the window please, I need some fresh air.
Could you close the window please, I am feeling cold.
Could you turn the fan on please, I am feeling hot.
Could you turn the fan off please, I am cold.
I am sweating quite a lot, could you help me cool down please.
I think I may have a fever, could someone check my temperature please.
I am shivering and cannot seem to warm up, could I have another blanket please.
Could I please have a heat pack for my sore area.
Could I please have an ice pack to help with the swelling.
Could I please have some water, I am thirsty.
I am very thirsty, could I please have some water.
Could I please have some cold water, I am feeling quite warm.
Could I please have some warm water to drink.
I am hungry, could I please have something to eat.
Could I please have some food, I am feeling hungry.
I would like some breakfast please, I am feeling hungry.
Could I please have some lunch, it is around that time.
I am ready for dinner whenever it is available please.
Could I please have a small snack, I am feeling a little hungry.
Could I please have some juice, I would like something to drink.
Could I please have a cup of tea, I would enjoy that very much.
I need to use the bathroom, could someone help me please.
I urgently need to use the bathroom, please help me right away.
I need a bedpan please, it is quite urgent.
Could I please have the urinal, I need to use it.
My mouth is very dry, could I please have some water or a mouth swab.
My lips are very dry, could I please have some lip balm.
I am feeling hungry, could I please have something to eat.
I am very thirsty, could I please have some water or juice.
I think it may be time for my medication, could you please check.
Could you please hand me my glasses, I need them to see.
Could you please help me with my hearing aid, I am having trouble with it.
Could you please help me with my dentures.
Could you help me change my position please, I am uncomfortable.
Could you help me sit up please, I would like to change my position.
Could you help me lie down please, I am tired.
Could you adjust my pillow please, I am not comfortable.
Could you prop my pillow up a bit more please.
Could you lower my pillow a little please, it is too high.
I am feeling uncomfortable, could you help me adjust my position.
Could you raise the head of my bed a little please.
Could you lower my bed a little please.
Could you help me turn onto my left side please.
Could you help me turn onto my right side please.
Could you help me lie on my back please.
Could you elevate my feet a little please, it would help my comfort.
Could you place a support pillow under my arm please, it is feeling strained.
Could you place a pillow under my legs please for some support.
I am feeling a lot of pressure on one spot, could you help me shift position please.
Could you help straighten my sheets please, they are bunched up uncomfortably.
My clothing is feeling very tight and uncomfortable, could you help adjust it.
I have an itch I cannot reach, could you help me please.
My legs are feeling numb, could you help me reposition them please.
I need help with my physical therapy exercises, could you assist me please.
I am ready to do my exercises now if that works for you.
I need to stop the exercises for now, I am in too much discomfort.
Could we slow down the exercises a little please, I need a moment.
This exercise is too hard for me right now, could we try a different one.
This exercise is causing me pain, I think we should stop for today.
Could we please do that exercise one more time, I would like to practice.
Could you help me practice walking please, I would like to try.
Could you help me stand up please, I want to try bearing some weight.
I am having trouble with my balance, could you please stay close.
Could we do some stretching please, my muscles feel very tight.
Could we do a very gentle stretch please, I am quite stiff today.
I am too tired for exercises today, could we reschedule for later please.
I am in pain while doing this exercise, we may need to adjust it.
Could you help me get into my wheelchair please.
Could you help me get back into bed from my wheelchair please.
Could I please have my walker so I can practice moving around.
Could you hand me my crutches please, I would like to try walking.
Could you help me put my brace on please.
Could you help me take my brace off please, it is uncomfortable.
My brace feels too tight, could you adjust it a little please.
I feel like I am making some progress, thank you for your encouragement.
I feel like my progress is very slow and I am a little discouraged.
Could we do the exercises a little later today please, I need to rest first.
Could you show me how to do that exercise one more time please.
How long do I need to do this exercise for please.
I need to take a rest now, I have done as much as I can for today.
My muscles are very tight, could I please have a gentle massage.
Could we work on some hand and finger exercises please.
Could we do some arm strengthening exercises today please.
I would like to work on my leg exercises if possible please.
Could a nurse please come and see me.
Nurse, I need your help please, could you come.
I am sorry to bother you nurse, but I need some assistance.
I would like to speak with a doctor please.
Could you please call the doctor, I need to speak with them.
Could my therapist please come and see me when they are available.
I need help please, could someone come.
I need help right now, please come quickly.
This is urgent, I need assistance immediately please.
I need emergency help right now, please call someone immediately.
I have a question, could someone please come and speak with me.
Could someone please explain what is happening with my treatment.
I do not fully understand, could you please explain that again more slowly.
Could you please write that down for me so I can read it.
Could you please speak more slowly, I am having trouble understanding.
Could you repeat that please, I did not quite catch it.
I would like to speak with a social worker please when one is available.
I would like to see my family, could you contact them please.
Could you please call my family for me, I would like to speak with them.
Could you ask my family to come visit me please.
Could I please use the phone to call someone.
Could you help me call my family on the phone please.
I am expecting a visitor, could you let them in please.
Could you please contact my spouse or partner for me.
Could you please get in touch with my child for me.
Could you please tell me when visiting hours are today.
I would prefer to have some privacy right now, could I please have a moment alone.
Could you please stay with me for a little while, I do not want to be alone.
Could you please send a message to my family to let them know how I am doing.
I am feeling scared and anxious, could someone stay with me please.
I am scared and do not want to be alone, could someone please stay.
I am feeling sad right now, could someone please come talk to me.
I am feeling lonely, could someone please come sit with me for a while.
I am feeling worried, could someone explain what is happening please.
I am feeling very anxious right now, I could use some reassurance.
I am feeling happy today, thank you for taking such good care of me.
I am feeling very tired, I would like to rest now please.
I am very tired and would like to sleep, could you help me get comfortable.
I am feeling bored, could someone bring me something to do please.
I am feeling very frustrated with my recovery, I could use some encouragement.
I am feeling hopeful about my progress today, thank you for your support.
I am feeling quite upset, could someone please come and talk with me.
I am feeling completely overwhelmed right now, I need some support please.
I am missing home and feeling quite homesick, could we talk please.
I am feeling embarrassed about needing so much help, but I do appreciate it.
I am so grateful for all the care I am receiving, thank you very much.
The pain is really getting me down emotionally, I could use some support.
I just need a moment, I am feeling quite emotional right now.
I am feeling discouraged, could you please offer me some encouragement.
I am going to stay positive and keep working hard at my recovery.
I am feeling dizzy, could someone please check on me.
I am feeling nauseous, I think I might be sick.
I am not feeling well, I think I need medical attention.
I am having difficulty breathing, please come help me right away.
I am very dizzy, I need someone to come check on me immediately.
My heart is beating very fast, I need someone to check on me please.
I am having trouble swallowing, could someone come help me please.
I think I am bleeding, please come and check on me right away.
I notice some swelling that was not there before, could someone please check it.
I have developed a rash on my skin, could someone please take a look.
Part of my body has gone numb, could someone come check on me please.
I have a strange tingling sensation, could someone please check on me.
My vision has become blurry, I need someone to check on me right away.
I think I am going to vomit, could someone please bring something quickly.
I have not been able to have a bowel movement and I am uncomfortable.
My tube is causing me discomfort, could someone please check on it.
My IV line is causing me pain, could someone please take a look at it.
My catheter is very uncomfortable, could a nurse please come check on it.
Could someone please check my wound or bandage, it does not feel right.
My bandage feels like it has come loose, could someone please fix it.
My bandage is too tight and causing me discomfort, could you loosen it please.
I am worried I might fall if I try to move, could someone please assist me.
Could you please turn the television on for me.
Could you please turn the television off, I would like some quiet.
Could you help me change the television channel please.
Could you please turn the television volume down a little.
Could you please turn the television volume up a little, I cannot hear it well.
Could you please turn the light on, it is too dark in here.
Could you please turn the light off, I would like to rest.
Could you please dim the lights a little, they are quite bright.
It is too loud in here, could you please help reduce the noise.
Could we have some quiet please, I am trying to rest.
Could you play some soft music for me please.
Could you please turn the music off, I would like some silence.
Could you please close the curtain, I would like some privacy.
Could you please open the curtain, I would like to see outside.
Could you please show me how to use the call bell, I want to be sure I can reach it.
Could you bring me something to read please, I am feeling bored.
Could you help me with my tablet please, I would like to use it.
My phone needs charging, could you help plug it in please.
Could you turn on the radio for me please.
Could you please empty the waste bin near me, it is quite full.
There is an unpleasant smell in the room, could someone help please.
Could you adjust the window blind please, the sun is in my eyes.
Could you please help me wash my hands.
Could you help me wash my face please, I would feel much better.
I would like to have a bath or shower when possible please.
Could you help me brush my teeth please.
Could you help me with my hair please, it is bothering me.
Could you please help me change into clean clothes.
Could you help me change my hospital gown please.
Could you please help me apply some deodorant.
Could someone please help me shave.
I need some help cleaning up, could someone assist me please.
I am feeling quite unclean and uncomfortable, could I please be helped to freshen up.
My nails are quite long and bothering me, could someone help cut them please.
I am home alone and I need some assistance, could someone come please.
I have fallen at home and I need help getting up safely.
This is an emergency at home, please call for help immediately.
Could my home carer please come, I need some assistance today.
My carer has not arrived yet and I am in need of assistance.
I need help with my home medications, could someone assist me please.
My equipment at home has stopped working, I need help fixing it or replacing it.
I am finding the steps at home very difficult, I need some guidance please.
Could you please help me with the door, I am having difficulty with it.
I need help with grocery shopping or supplies, could we arrange that please.
I have an appointment coming up and I need help getting ready and getting there.
I need to cancel my upcoming appointment, could you help me do that please.
I need help arranging transport to and from my appointment please.
I am concerned about my safety at home, could we talk about ways to help.
Could you remind me which exercises I should be doing at home please.
I am having trouble keeping up with my home care routine, I need some support.
Thank you so much for your help, I really appreciate everything you do.
Thank you nurse, you have been so kind and helpful.
Thank you to my physical therapist, your encouragement means the world to me.
I am feeling good today, thank you for asking.
I am feeling a little better today, thank you for the care.
Yes, that is correct, thank you for understanding.
No thank you, I am alright for now.
That is okay, I understand, thank you.
I am sorry for the trouble, I appreciate your patience with me.
I am sorry to bother you nurse, I know you are very busy.
I am feeling great today and I am ready to work hard at my recovery.
I am ready and feeling up to trying that now, thank you for waiting.
Yes I agree with that plan, please go ahead.
I am not sure I agree with that, could we discuss it further please.
I understand now, thank you for taking the time to explain it to me.
I really appreciate all the hard work everyone puts in to help me.
I feel like I am being very well cared for here, thank you so much.
